nodes.label: AI as curiosity-driven exploration tool
nodes.grounding_span: I like to use AI for very loose conceptual ideas (such as color palettes), material research

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: We like to let the assistant throw things at the wall and only give necessary direction

nodes.label: Anonymity and concept security in AI interactions
nodes.label_negative: Exposure of unique ideas to AI
nodes.grounding_span: I like specific ideas to be anonymous when talking to an assistant for idea and concept security

nodes.label: AI for low-stakes tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for high-stakes, core creative work
nodes.grounding_span: AI gives really great and fun suggestions for original home building ideas in Sims! ... it's very fun and stress-free because I don't really care about those ideas as much

nodes.label: AI as compromise to creative integrity
nodes.grounding_span: so many artists are terrified right now because of their works getting scraped and losing value

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: we independently enjoy refining and drafting our own finalized concepts or ideas

nodes.label: Efficient knowledge discovery
nodes.grounding_span: allows us to focus our research and save time

nodes.label: Creative integrity and human artistry
nodes.grounding_span: I feel bad for people who are losing work

nodes.label: Positive appreciation for AI as research catalyst
nodes.grounding_span: It felt nice to get some more ideas, and it allowed us to discuss many of the suggestions on our own!

nodes.label: Cautious boundary-setting around idea protection
nodes.grounding_span: I am wary about what I tell the models in order to avoid accidentally training it personal/unique ideas

nodes.label: Concern for artists directly impacted by AI
nodes.grounding_span: I feel bad for people who are losing work

nodes.label: Enthusiasm for low-stakes AI play
nodes.grounding_span: it's very fun and stress-free because I don't really care about those ideas as much

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through conversation
nodes.grounding_span: We did not directly specify which ideas we liked to the assistant, so it doesn't know whether we liked or disliked a suggestion

nodes.label: Domain-dependent risk calibration — low vs high stakes
nodes.grounding_span: I might use AI for building ideas in my story in the future, because I feel like that can be low-stress!
